Name: ITEM_TYPE_PARAM
Description: Defines item type behavior, usage animations, movement speed modifiers, inventory handling, and category-specific settings.

Fields.Name: Failure Item ID
Fields.Description: Item ID granted or used when item activation fails.

Fields.Name: Maximum Item Use Speed Multiplier
Fields.Description: Maximum movement or animation speed multiplier applied while using the item.

Fields.Name: Max Speed Transition Time (Sec)
Fields.Description: Time required to transition to the maximum item use speed multiplier.

Fields.Name: Max Speed Recovery Time (Sec)
Fields.Description: Time required to return from the maximum item use speed multiplier to normal speed.

Fields.Name: Item Use Animation
Fields.Description: Specifies the animation type used when the item is activated.

Fields.Name: Ladder Item Use Animation
Fields.Description: Specifies the animation type used when activating the item while on a ladder.

Fields.Name: Item Category
Fields.Description: General category classification for the item type.

Fields.Name: Item Use Arm Type
Fields.Description: Determines which arm or hand configuration is used during the item use animation.

Fields.Name: Idle Model Type
Fields.Description: Specifies the model or display type shown when the item is idle or equipped.

Fields.Name: Special Item Reset
Fields.Description: Controls whether special item-related states or effects are reset after use.

Fields.Name: Allow Storage Transfer
Fields.Description: Determines whether the item can be moved to storage or repository.
